title: SCIM 2.0 Enterprise User Extension (RFC 7643 §4.3)
description: Validates the body of the SCIM Enterprise User extension as defined in RFC 7643 §4.3. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User. Pinned to UIAO_143. This schema validates the *extension object* — i.e. the value at the key 'urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User' on a User resource — not a standalone resource.

employeeNumber.description: RFC 7643 §4.3. String identifier (numeric or alphanumeric) assigned to a person, typically based on order of hire.

manager.description: RFC 7643 §4.3. Complex type referencing the user's manager.

value.description: The 'id' of the SCIM resource representing the user's manager. RECOMMENDED.

$ref.description: URI of the SCIM resource representing the user's manager. RECOMMENDED.

displayName.description: displayName of the user's manager. OPTIONAL, mutability readOnly.
